creator: almarrie@gmail.com
text:
On 9/30/07, Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi Abdullah,
>
> there hasn't been an update on the state of this for quite a while. In the
> meantime, there have been updates to Xorg. Can you still reproduce the
> problem on an up-to-date system, or can this problem report be closed?
>
> Best regards,
> Stefan
>

Hello Stefan,

Thank you for follow up, I don't have running laptop with FreeBSD, so
I didn't upgrade to xorg 7.3

Feel free to close it since I can't test it.

-- 
Regards,

-Abdullah Ibn Hamad Al-Marri
Arab Portal
http://www.WeArab.Net/
